channel.title: Documentary on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Documentary on Alien Truth Social

item.title: The Unexplained Files
item.description:
The Unexplained Files is an American documentary television series that aired on Science Channel. The series investigated paranormal and unexplained phenomena across two seasons, with the first season having 8 episodes and the second season planning 12. While it was the most watched series on the Science Channel during its first season, critics noted its tendency to focus on sensationalized theories over scientific explanations. One review highlighted how a veterinarian’s explanation for cattle mutilations was given minimal airtime compared to “outlandish theories,” leading to criticism of the show as biased.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Unexplained_Files

item.title: UFO Coverup? Live
item.description:
UFO Coverup? Live was a US television broadcast that aired on October 14, 1988, and introduced the Majestic 12 hoax and Area 51 to Americans. Hosted by Mike Farrell, the program discussed various UFO incidents and featured interviews with ufologists, pilots, and skeptics. It also included clips from films with alien themes and presented claims from informants about aliens and a government agreement for an Area 51 base. The program later faced criticism for its truthfulness and was noted for influencing The X-Files.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_Cover_Up%3F_Live

item.title: UFO: The True Story of Flying Saucers
item.description:
UFO (full title: Unidentified Flying Objects: The True Story of Flying Saucers) is a 1956 American semi-documentary film exploring the UFO phenomenon in the United States. The film begins by recounting early publicized UFO sightings and the US Air Force’s initial investigations, including Project Sign. It then follows Albert M. Chop, a public information officer, as his views on UFOs evolve from skepticism to belief in their unknown, possibly extraterrestrial, origin. The documentary analyzes notable UFO footage and culminates with a recreation of the 1952 Washington, D.C. UFO incident, in which Chop played a significant role.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_%281956_film%29

item.title: Above Majestic
item.description:
Above Majestic is a 2018 documentary film that proposes a global conspiracy theory involving reptilian aliens who secretly control world governments. The film posits that these aliens inhabit Antarctica, are preparing for an invasion, and are behind the September 11 attacks as a means to hide their conspiracy. According to Vice, the documentary claims these aliens control governments and banks. Researchers reported in 2021 that a QAnon-linked Twitter user may have aided in the film’s production.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Above_Majestic
